source_system_config: Derived at runtime from the `-s` argument in `.mcp.json`. The orchestrator reads this value at Step 0 and passes it to all subagents as <source_system>. Do not hardcode system IDs in agent prompts.

write: <target_system> selected by developer at Stage 3 runtime

policy_notes: ZLLM_WRITE must never be configured to connect to DQ1 or DP1.
Any write by dev-agent requires explicit per-object developer approval typed in the CLI.
All write operations require the object to be assigned to a Transport Request before proceeding.
Approval log must be written to ./project/<ticket>/03_change_log.md before the write is executed.
The source system for reads is always derived from .mcp.json `-s` argument — never hardcoded.
